zh.lifeSummary: 當Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray於1390年出生在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾時，他的父親Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis35歲，母親Janet Mortimer of March32歲。他於1418年8月31日與Elizabeth Wemyss在英國蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1469年在英國蘇格蘭培爾享年79歲。

zh-hans.Broxmouth, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 苏格兰哈丁頓史爾布洛姆斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray于1390年出生在英国苏格兰洛包爾时，他的父亲Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis35岁，母亲Janet Mortimer of March32岁。他于1418年8月31日与Elizabeth Wemyss在英国苏格兰培爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1469年在英国苏格兰培爾享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: McGreevy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Seamus, Brendan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Riabhaigh, a patronymic from the personal name Riabhach ‘brindled, grizzled’. Compare Reavey and Creevy 2.

variants.name: Grayer
meanings: English (southern): nickname from Middle English grei ‘gray’ (see Gray ) + her ‘hair’.

variants.name: Grays
meanings: English (Durham): variant of Gray , with post-medieval excrescent -s, or of Grace .

variants.name: Grice
meanings: English (Midlands): from Middle English grice, grise ‘pig’ (Old Norse gríss), probably a nickname or a metonymic occupational name for a swineherd.
English: nickname for a gray-haired man, from Middle English grice, gris ‘gray’ (Old French gris, apparently of ancient Germanic origin, and probably a distant cognate of Gray 1).
Possibly also an Americanized form of German   Greis  .

variants.name: Grey
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

en.lifeSummary: When Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray was born in 1390, in Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis, was 35 and his mother, Janet Mortimer of March, was 32. He married Elizabeth Wemyss on 31 August 1418, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1469, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray est né en 1390, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Janet Mortimer of March, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Wemyss le 31 août 1418, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1469, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray 1390 in Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis 35 und seine Mutter Janet Mortimer of March 32. Er hat am 31. August 1418 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Elizabeth Wemyss geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1469 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray è nato il nel 1390 nel Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Janet Mortimer of March, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Wemyss il 31 agosto 1418, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1469, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Andrew Gray 1st Lord Grayが1390年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulisは35歳，母Janet Mortimer of Marchは32歳であった。1418年8月31日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアでElizabeth Wemyssと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1469年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで79歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray(이)가 1390년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Janet Mortimer of March(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1418년 8월 31일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 Elizabeth Wemyss(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1469년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray nasceu em 1390, em Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Janet Mortimer of March, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Wemyss em 31 de agosto de 1418, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1469, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray родился в 1390 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Mortimer of March, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Wemyss 31 августа 1418 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1469 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Andrew Gray 1st Lord Gray nació en 1390, en Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Andrew Gray of Broxmouth - Lord Grey of Foulis, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Janet Mortimer of March, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Wemyss el 31 de agosto de 1418, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1469, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 79 años.
